title: Settlements Visited
query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT SettlementName) AS total FROM ApproachSettlement WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT SettlementName AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM ApproachSettlement WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY SettlementName ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20

details.text: {total} settlement approach(es) recorded during the report period. Favoured settlements are the recurring stages of your Odyssey story — repeatedly visiting the same installation means you know its layout, its patrol patterns, and exactly where the most interesting items spawn.
details.help: ApproachSettlement fires when the ship gets close to a surface settlement. total drives the title.

tagLines: Settlement approach log compiled. Most frequently visited installations noted in the operations record.
You scout a settlement once. After the tenth visit, you know it like your own carrier.
Some settlements become familiar. The log shows which ones you keep coming back to.
